title: Brevo vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo and Flodesk: pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your needs best.
h1: Brevo vs Flodesk: Complete Comparison Guide
intro: Brevo and Flodesk are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Brevo excels as an all-in-one CRM with multi-channel capabilities, while Flodesk specializes in visually stunning emails for creative professionals. Understanding their differences will help you choose the right tool for your business.

comparison_table.tool_a: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, Live Chat, CRM, API
comparison_table.tool_b: Beautiful templates, workflows, checkout forms, link in bio

choose_a_if: You need a free plan with access to 100,000 contacts
You want SMS, WhatsApp, and multi-channel marketing capabilities
You require transactional email API and CRM features for complex workflows
You're building an ecommerce or SaaS business needing advanced automation
choose_b_if: You prioritize design and visual aesthetics in your emails
You prefer flat-rate pricing with unlimited subscribers included
You're a creative professional, photographer, or designer
You want built-in checkout forms and link-in-bio functionality
You're willing to pay upfront for a simpler, more specialized tool

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. Brevo is superior for businesses requiring multi-channel marketing, CRM features, and cost-effective scaling. Flodesk wins for visual-first brands and creative professionals who value design and simplicity. Check your specific requirements against each platform's strengths.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Flodesk?
faq.a: Brevo is significantly cheaper, offering a free tier with up to 100,000 contacts and paid plans starting at $25/month. Flodesk has no free tier and starts at $38/month but includes unlimited subscribers. For large contact lists, Brevo's freemium model makes it more budget-friendly.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, you can export your contact list and campaigns from Flodesk and import them into Brevo. Both platforms support standard CSV exports and email list imports. However, you may lose some design elements during migration, as Brevo's template approach differs from Flodesk's visual editor.
